sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Carpenter Technology Corporation to Issue Quarterly Dividend of $0.20 (NYSE:CRS)
feed.summary: Carpenter Technology Corporation (NYSE:CRS) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.20 per share, payable on June 4th to shareholders of record on April 28th. The company's dividend payout ratio is a low 8.8%, indicating strong coverage by earnings, with analysts expecting continued coverage next year. This announcement follows a positive earnings report where the company beat EPS estimates and grew revenue by 7.5%, causing the stock to jump 4.6% to $445.75, near its 52-week high.

feed.title: CPRJ Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:CPRJ
feed.summary: The Calamos Russell 2000 Structured Alt Protection ETF July (CPRJ) invests in FLEX options to mirror the performance of IWM shares up to a cap, while protecting against losses over a one-year period. Issued by Calamos Family Partners, Inc., this active fund was launched on July 1, 2024, and has assets under management of $23.25 million, with an expense ratio of 0.69%. CPRJ does not pay dividends and trades at a slight premium to its NAV.

feed.title: AT&T Inc. (NYSE:T) Sees Significant Increase in Short Interest
feed.summary: AT&T Inc. (NYSE:T) experienced a significant 20.5% increase in short interest in March, totaling 118.25 million shares, representing approximately 1.7% of its stock. Despite this bearish sentiment, the company recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.2775 per share and surpassed Q1 earnings expectations, reporting $0.52 EPS versus a $0.46 consensus. AT&T also provided strong FY2026 guidance, forecasting EPS between $2.25 and $2.35, which is above analyst consensus.

feed.title: L3Harris Technologies Inc (NYSE:LHX) Short Interest Update
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies Inc (NYSE:LHX) saw a 19.6% increase in short interest during March, reaching 3,030,865 shares. Despite this, analysts largely maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $349.55. Insiders have been net sellers in the last 90 days, while the company recently increased its quarterly dividend to $1.25 per share.

feed.title: Short Interest in Sempra Energy (NYSE:SRE) Increases By 19.8%
feed.summary: Sempra Energy (NYSE:SRE) experienced a significant increase in short interest, rising by 19.8% to 10.62 million shares as of March 31st, representing 1.6% of the stock. Insider trading showed mixed signals, with a director buying shares and an EVP selling, resulting in net insider selling over the last 90 days. Despite this, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $101.64, and the company recently beat Q4 EPS estimates and increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Lifts Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) PT on Updated Biopharma Models
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has raised its price target for Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) to $612 from $596, maintaining an Overweight rating. This decision follows updated biopharma models reflecting IQVIA trends and intra-quarter developments ahead of Q1 earnings. RBC Capital Markets also recently increased its price target for VRTX, citing a preview of Q1 biotech results and potential M&A activity balancing seasonal pressures.

feed.title: Chatham Lodging Trust (REIT) (NYSE:CLDT) Sees Significant Increase in Short Interest
feed.summary: Chatham Lodging Trust (NYSE:CLDT) experienced a significant 33.0% increase in short interest in March, reaching 912,080 shares, representing 2.1% of its shares. Despite missing quarterly EPS estimates, the REIT raised its quarterly dividend to $0.10, yielding 4.6%. Institutional ownership is notably high at 88.37%, with several major funds recently increasing their stakes in the company.

feed.title: Callan JMB Issues Statement on Recently Filed Lawsuit by Eddie Patent Holdings LLC
feed.summary: Callan JMB Inc. has issued a statement regarding a lawsuit filed against it by Eddie Patent Holdings, LLC in the U.S. District Court for the Northern District of Texas. The company, an integrative logistics provider for the healthcare industry, believes the claims are without merit and intends to respond through legal channels. Callan JMB emphasized that the litigation does not affect its operations or strategic partnerships and remains focused on its long-term goals.

feed.title: Ciena CEO Smith sells $1.38 million in stock
feed.summary: Ciena CEO Gary B. Smith sold 2,952 shares of company stock for approximately $1.38 million, following a pre-arranged trading plan. This transaction occurred amidst several positive developments for Ciena, including raised price targets from BofA Securities, Stifel, and UBS due to increased backlog and strong demand. The company also recently elected directors and demonstrated quantum secure communications technology.

feed.title: CACC (NASDAQ: CACC) Form 144 shows 4,062-share sale; Rummler sold 8,126 shares
feed.summary: A Form 144 filing for Credit Acceptance Corporation (CACC) indicates a proposed sale of 4,062 shares stemming from options granted on December 30, 2020, with a listed sale date of April 17, 2026. The filing also reports previous sales by Wendy Rummler, totaling 8,126 shares across two transactions in January and February 2026 for a combined value of approximately $4 million. The document provides details on the regulatory requirements for Form 144 and includes key figures related to the proposed and past sales.

feed.title: Otis Worldwide Corp. stock (US68902V1070): Is its service-driven model strong enough to unlock stead
feed.summary: Otis Worldwide Corp. is a global leader in elevators and escalators, appealing to investors due to its service-driven business model which provides recurring revenue and stability against construction cycles. The company benefits from global urbanization trends and infrastructure modernization, particularly in the US and English-speaking markets. Analysts view Otis positively for its cash generation and defensive profile, though risks like construction slowdowns and supply chain disruptions exist.

feed.title: Cross Country Healthcare Schedules Q1 2026 Earnings Release
feed.summary: Cross Country Healthcare (CCRN) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results after market close on May 7, 2026, followed by an earnings conference call that same day at 5:00 p.m. ET. The company aims for transparency with shareholders and analysts, providing a webcast and replay of the call. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates CCRN as Neutral, citing deteriorating financial performance despite positive cash flow and a low-leverage balance sheet.

feed.title: The Bull Case For Bank of Montreal (TSX:BMO) Could Change Following Its Big AI And Quantum Bet – Learn Why
feed.summary: Bank of Montreal (BMO) recently established the BMO Institute for Applied Artificial Intelligence & Quantum and formed partnerships to enhance its AI and quantum capabilities. While this move signals a significant push into advanced technologies for governance, client service, and workforce development, it doesn't immediately alter the bank's core investment focus on credit quality, loan growth, and cost management. Investors should monitor whether these technology investments lead to increased efficiency or if rising expenses outpace revenue growth.

feed.title: Super Micro Computer Shareholder Alert: ClaimsFiler Reminds Investors With Losses In Excess Of $100,000 Of Lead Plaintiff Deadline In Class Action Lawsuits Against Super Micro Computer, Inc. - SMCI
feed.summary: ClaimsFiler is reminding Super Micro Computer, Inc. investors with losses exceeding $100,000 that the lead plaintiff deadline in securities class action lawsuits is May 26, 2026. The lawsuits allege that Super Micro and its executives failed to disclose material information regarding a scheme to divert servers with U.S. AI technology to China, violating export control laws. This alleged scheme led to a significant drop in Super Micro's stock price.

feed.title: Assessing Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BK) Valuation After Strong Recent Share Price Momentum
feed.summary: Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BK) has shown strong share price momentum recently, with a narrative model suggesting it is about 1% overvalued at $135.10 against a fair value of $133.50. Analysts project earnings to increase to $6.5 billion by April 2029, up from $5.3 billion. While its P/E ratio of 16.2x is below the industry average, investors should still consider potential risks like fee pressure and market conditions.

feed.title: Alphabet director Hennessy sells $348k in GOOGL stock
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. Director John L. Hennessy sold 1,045 shares of Class C Capital Stock for a total of $348,232 on April 15, 2026. Despite the sale, Hennessy still holds a significant amount of Alphabet stock. InvestingPro analysis suggests Alphabet may be overvalued based on current metrics.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Fastenal (FAST) After Its Strong Multi Year Share Price Run?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Fastenal (FAST) using valuation models, concluding it appears overvalued based on discounted cash flow and P/E ratios. Despite strong multi-year share price performance, the analysis suggests the market price is significantly higher than its estimated intrinsic value. The article then presents both bullish and bearish narratives for the company's future performance.

feed.title: New Burlington store opens in Fresno with ribbon-cutting ceremony
feed.summary: A new Burlington store has opened in Fresno on Blackstone, marked by a ribbon-cutting ceremony on Friday. The store made a $5,000 donation to teachers at Pinedale Elementary School to support local education. This new location features Burlington's modernized store design and offers a wide range of products including apparel, accessories, home decor, and baby items.

feed.title: Core Scientific (CORZ) executive has shares withheld to cover RSU taxes
feed.summary: Core Scientific executive Todd M. Duchene reported that 16,741 shares of common stock were withheld to cover tax obligations arising from the vesting of restricted stock units (RSUs). The shares were valued at $19.08 each for the withholding purpose, and after this transaction, Duchene directly holds 2,010,348 shares. This Form 4 filing indicates a tax-related disposition rather than an open-market sale.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Devin Johnson Sells Shares of Progressive Corp (PGR)
feed.summary: Devin Johnson, a Director at Progressive Corp (PGR), sold 980 shares of the company on April 16, 2026, and now owns 8,621 shares. Over the past year, there have been no insider buys and 34 insider sells at Progressive Corp. The stock is currently trading at $203.1, and with a GF Value of $268.58, it is considered modestly undervalued.

feed.title: Judge Resets Investors' Lead Counsel In Globe Life Suit
feed.summary: A Texas federal judge has restructured the leadership in consolidated shareholder derivative litigation concerning Globe Life Insurance Inc. The Plymouth County Retirement Association has been appointed as the sole lead plaintiff, with Scott + Scott Attorneys at Law LLP and Bleichmar Fonti & Auld LLP named as sole co-lead counsel. This decision resets the previous leadership structure for the case.

feed.title: Cosmos Health plans Q2 U.S. launch of curcumin supplement
feed.summary: Cosmos Health Inc. (NASDAQ:COSM) announced its plan to launch Cur18, a curcumin supplement, in the U.S. market during the second quarter of 2026. The product, derived from turmeric, boasts significantly higher bioavailability than standard extracts and has shown promising results in clinical studies for joint health and inflammation. Despite a challenging recent period, the company's stock has seen a 35% gain over the last week, and its financials indicate growth in revenue though it remains unprofitable.

feed.title: Apollo Global Shareholder Alert: ClaimsFiler Reminds Investors With Losses In Excess Of $100,000 Of Lead Plaintiff Deadline In Class Action Lawsuit Against Apollo Global Management, Inc. - APO
feed.summary: ClaimsFiler is reminding investors who have incurred losses exceeding $100,000 in Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE: APO) securities to file lead plaintiff applications by May 1, 2026, in a pending class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Apollo and its executives failed to disclose material information regarding communications between company leaders and Jeffrey Epstein, which made statements about the company's business, operations, and prospects materially false and misleading. The class period for affected investors is between May 10, 2021, and February 21, 2026.

feed.title: Coca-Cola threatens to back out of recycling scheme over reputation concerns
feed.summary: Coca-Cola Europacific Partners (CCEP) is threatening to withdraw from Queensland, Australia's Containers for Change recycling program due to corruption allegations and concerns about its reputation. The program, which offers a 10-cent refund for recycled items, was subject to 10 allegations of corrupt behavior, and CCEP, along with Lion Australia, is a principal founding entity of the non-profit group managing the scheme. CCEP claims its reputation is linked to the program's integrity, while Lion warns that proposed changes would lead to higher consumer prices amidst a cost-of-living crisis.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Increases Delta (DAL) PT, Adjusts Airline Coverage Outlook
feed.summary: Evercore ISI's Duane Pfennigwerth raised the price target for Delta Air Lines (DAL) to $85 from $80, reiterating an Outperform rating. This adjustment comes after Delta's recent report and in anticipation of other airlines' earnings. The article also notes Delta's revised stance on sustainable aviation fuel targets and net-zero emissions, citing slow development in sustainable fuel technology as a challenge.

feed.title: Executive pay and board elections at Beam Therapeutics (NASDAQ: BEAM) 2026 virtual meeting
feed.summary: Beam Therapeutics (NASDAQ: BEAM) is holding its 2026 annual virtual shareholder meeting on June 3, 2026, where stockholders will vote on electing three Class III directors, ratifying Deloitte & Touche LLP as the independent auditor, and providing an advisory vote on named executive officer (NEO) compensation. In 2025, CEO John Evans received $5.8 million in total compensation, with executive bonuses funded at 135% of target due to strong clinical and financial milestones. The company's compensation program emphasizes performance-based incentives and long-term equity to align executive and shareholder interests.

feed.title: Brookfield Asset Management Completes $1 Billion Senior Notes Offering
feed.summary: Brookfield Asset Management Ltd. successfully completed a US$1 billion senior notes offering, issuing notes due in 2031 and 2036 with semiannual interest payments. This offering provides long-dated, structured funding, enhancing the company's balance sheet flexibility and supporting its long-term asset management strategy. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates BAM as "Outperform" due to strong financial performance and a positive earnings outlook, despite valuation concerns.

feed.title: Director Lucas Chang to retire from Alpha and Omega (AOSL) board
feed.summary: Alpha and Omega Semiconductor Limited (AOSL) announced that director Dr. Lucas S. Chang will retire from its Board of Directors, effective April 17, 2026. Dr. Chang notified the company of his decision on April 13, 2026. This change was reported in an 8-K filing under Item 5.02, which covers the departure of directors or officers.

feed.title: DRI Stock April 17: Darden Expands Restaurant Empire
feed.summary: Darden Restaurants Inc. is aggressively expanding its restaurant empire, evidenced by the recent grand opening of a Capital Grille in Nashville and plans for 65-70 new locations between May 2025 and April 2026. This strategy includes converting closed Bahama Breeze restaurants into other Darden brands to maximize real estate value. The expansion is expected to significantly boost revenue and profitability, strengthening Darden's competitive position in the casual dining market.

feed.title: Abbott Reaches Preliminary Settlement in Derivative Governance Case
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories has reached a preliminary settlement in shareholder derivative lawsuits related to its U.S. infant formula business, alleging inadequate oversight and misleading disclosures. The proposed settlement, preliminarily approved by a U.S. court on April 10, 2026, involves governance reforms and strengthens internal reporting. If finalized, all related claims will be dismissed with prejudice, and Abbott may pay up to $15.85 million in legal fees.

feed.title: Wells Fargo, Evercore ISI Trim Extra Space Storage (EXR) Targets Ahead of Q1
feed.summary: Wells Fargo and Evercore ISI have both trimmed their price targets for Extra Space Storage (NYSE: EXR) ahead of the Q1 earnings report. Wells Fargo lowered its target to $148 from $150 while maintaining an Overweight rating, expressing caution about storage REITs and watching for inflation and interest rate impacts. Evercore ISI adjusted its target to $149 from $150, keeping an In Line rating, as part of its Q1 storage REIT preview.

feed.title: Khloé Kardashian Introduces It’s a 10 Haircare Rebrand at Ulta Beauty World
feed.summary: Khloé Kardashian has been announced as the Global Brand Ambassador for It's a 10 Haircare, unveiling the brand's new visual rebrand and "Salon-Level Reinvention, At Home" campaign at Ulta Beauty World. The event, held in Orlando, Florida, also celebrated the brand's 20th anniversary and showcased Khloé promoting the upcoming exclusive summer 2026 launch at Ulta Beauty.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Lowers AmEx (AXP) PT; Reuters Reports Push into AI Expense Management
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley lowered its price target for American Express (AXP) to $385 from $395 due to higher macro uncertainty ahead of Q1 earnings, while maintaining an Equal Weight rating. Concurrently, Reuters reported that American Express plans to acquire Hyper, an AI-focused expense management startup, signaling a strategic push into AI for automating financial tasks. This acquisition aligns with AmEx CEO Stephen Squeri's view on AI creating a "structural shift" in business operations and aims to expand automation tools for commercial clients.

feed.title: Surge in Electricity Demand Benefits Utilities
feed.summary: The article discusses how increased electricity demand benefits utilities like Dominion Energy (D) and NextEra Energy (NEE). While Dominion offers a higher dividend yield, its history of failing to meet growth targets has eroded investor trust. NextEra, despite a lower yield, consistently delivers on its dividend growth promises, making it a more reliable choice for investors.

feed.title: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) Director Yvonne Wassenaar Sells 1,395 Shares
feed.summary: Arista Networks Director Yvonne Wassenaar sold 1,395 shares of ANET stock for $213,532.65 as part of a pre-arranged trading plan, reducing her direct ownership by 12.48%. This sale, along with larger sales by the CEO and CFO, could impact short-term investor sentiment despite the company's strong quarterly earnings beat and positive analyst ratings. Arista Networks reported $0.82 EPS and $2.49 billion in revenue for the quarter, exceeding analyst expectations and showing a 28.9% year-over-year revenue growth.

feed.title: China's AI Industry Shifts from Open-Source to Hybrid Commercial Models - News and Statistics
feed.summary: China's AI industry is moving away from purely open-source models towards hybrid commercial approaches due to increasingly narrow profit margins. While companies like Alibaba initially focused on open-source to reduce costs and gain market share, they are now seeking ways to monetize their AI models through inference and cloud computing services. This shift comes as the industry grapples with generating revenue from models lacking proprietary protections.

feed.title: Cardiff Oncology (CRDF) Unveils Promising Preclinical Data at AACR Meeting
feed.summary: Cardiff Oncology (CRDF) is presenting new preclinical data at the American Association for Cancer Research Annual Meeting, highlighting the efficacy of its PLK1 inhibitor, onvansertib, in combination with trastuzumab deruxtecan for HER2-low breast cancer models. The findings suggest significant antitumor effects and potential to overcome treatment resistance. With a moderate GF Score™ of 58, the clinical-stage biotech company shows financial stability through low debt but faces challenges in profitability and growth, as is common for firms at this stage.

feed.title: APi Group (NYSE:APG) Sees Large Volume Increase - Time to Buy?
feed.summary: APi Group (NYSE:APG) experienced a significant 126% surge in trading volume, reaching over 6 million shares, alongside a stock price increase to $46.88. This heightened interest follows positive analyst sentiment, with several brokers raising price targets and the company maintaining a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating after an earnings beat and strong revenue growth. Despite recent insider selling totaling over $152 million, insiders still hold a substantial 17% stake, while institutional investors own 86.62% of the company.

feed.title: Adams Diversified Equity Fund, Inc. (NYSE:ADX) Announces Quarterly Dividend of $0.48
feed.summary: Adams Diversified Equity Fund, Inc. (NYSE:ADX) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.48 per share, representing a 2.1% increase from its previous dividend and an annualized yield of 8.0%. The ex-dividend date is April 27th, and the payment date is May 29th. The stock recently traded up 0.7% to $23.96, with institutional investors holding 28.41% of the fund.

feed.title: Absci (NASDAQ:ABSI) Stock Price Up 11% - Still a Buy?
feed.summary: Absci (NASDAQ:ABSI) shares rose 11% on Friday, despite missing quarterly earnings and revenue expectations significantly. The company operates with a negative net margin and analysts forecast a negative EPS for the fiscal year, leading to a consensus "Hold" rating with an average price target of $6.44. Insider ownership is 10.49% (including a recent purchase by Andreas Busch) and institutional ownership is approximately 52%.

feed.title: Magnetar Funds sell calls tied to 2M CoreWeave (CRWV) shares
feed.summary: Magnetar Funds have sold call options referencing 2 million shares of CoreWeave (CRWV) Class A Common Stock. These transactions, dated April 15, 2026, involve call options with a $160.00 exercise price and an expiration date of December 18, 2026. The filing classifies these as open-market sales of derivative securities by Magnetar-managed funds, with reporting persons disclaiming beneficial ownership beyond their pecuniary interest.

feed.title: Magnetar funds trim CoreWeave (CRWV) stake with 2,604,094-share sale
feed.summary: Funds advised by Magnetar Financial LLC sold a total of 2,604,094 shares of CoreWeave (CRWV) Class A Common Stock on April 15, 2026, through 27 open-market transactions. The sales occurred at weighted average prices ranging from approximately $117.79 to $119.34 per share, totaling over $309 million. Despite these sales, Magnetar-related entities still retain significant multi-million share positions in CoreWeave.

feed.title: Magnetar Financial sells CoreWeave (CRWV) stock worth $26.9 million
feed.summary: Magnetar Financial LLC, a significant owner in CoreWeave, Inc. (CRWV), sold 229,275 shares of Class A Common Stock for approximately $26.9 million on April 16, 2026. Despite the sale, Magnetar Financial and its related entities still hold a substantial number of CoreWeave shares. This development follows CoreWeave's announcement of a $1 billion private offering of senior notes and a $6 billion agreement with Jane Street, which includes a $1 billion investment from Jane Street.

feed.title: [Form 4] CoreWeave, Inc. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Magnetar-managed funds reported open-market sales of 1,404,667 shares of CoreWeave, Inc. Class A Common Stock on April 16, 2026, at weighted average prices between $117.71 and $120.00 per share. Despite these sales, Magnetar funds, including Magnetar Financial LLC, Magnetar Capital Partners LP, Supernova Management LLC, and David J. Snyderman, still retain substantial positions in CoreWeave, disclaiming beneficial ownership only beyond their pecuniary interests. The transaction indicates a partial trimming of positions by a major institutional holder rather than a complete exit.

feed.title: First Texas BJ's Wholesale Club location offers $2 gas for members
feed.summary: BJ's Wholesale Club has opened its first Texas location in Forney, offering members a special $2 per gallon gas price for one day only on April 22nd. This marks the club's 264th location and 202nd gas station, with plans for three more Texas clubs to open in the coming weeks. The company also announced a $25,000 grant to the Forney Food Pantry.

feed.title: EDGAR Filing Documents for 0001731122-26-000591
feed.summary: This article details an EDGAR filing for Form 424B3 (Prospectus) by CDT Environmental Technology Investment Holdings Ltd. The filing has an accession number of 0001731122-26-000591, was filed and accepted on April 17, 2026, and includes various documents and graphics. It provides the company's mailing and business addresses, CIK, EIN, state of incorporation, and fiscal year end.

feed.title: Alcoa Nears Sale of New York Smelter Site to NYDIG: Bloomberg
feed.summary: Alcoa Corp is reportedly close to selling its former Massena East smelter site in upstate New York to NYDIG, a digital asset firm, for repurposing into a data center. This potential deal follows a trend of closed industrial sites, particularly those with existing grid connections and high electricity capacity, being acquired by Bitcoin mining and high-performance computing companies like TeraWulf. Alcoa CEO Bill Oplinger expects the sale to close by mid-year.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Clene (NASDAQ:CLNN) Major Shareholder Sells 25,040 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Clene (NASDAQ:CLNN) major shareholder Chidozie Ugwumba sold 25,040 shares of the company's stock on April 17th for $161,007.20, reducing his stake by 6.46%. This sale is part of a series of recent disposals. Despite the insider selling and a reported quarterly EPS of -$0.88, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $33.00, indicating a divergence between insider sentiment and analyst optimism.

feed.title: Clene Inc. (CLNN) major holder sells 39,162 common shares
feed.summary: Ugwumba Chidozie, a ten percent owner of Clene Inc. (CLNN) through SymBiosis II, LLC, reported open-market sales of 39,162 common shares over three days in April 2026. These transactions, which involved sales at prices between $6.40 and $6.48 per share, reduced SymBiosis II, LLC's indirect ownership to 362,729 shares. The sales totaled approximately $251,898 and are categorized as having a moderate impact and negative sentiment.

feed.title: Chidozie Ugwumba Sells 6,374 Shares of Clene (NASDAQ:CLNN) Stock
feed.summary: Chidozie Ugwumba, a major shareholder of Clene Inc. (NASDAQ:CLNN), sold 6,374 shares of the company's stock on April 15th for over $41,000, reducing his ownership by 1.59%. This is part of a series of trades since January, with his current holdings valued at approximately $2.56 million. Clene shares recently traded down to $6.31, and the company reported a quarterly loss, though analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average $33.00 price target.
